description: One of three equal parts, representing the sacred geometry of triangular division. It embodies the principle that some wholes naturally divide into three harmonious portions.
rationale: The word 'thiro' echoes 'thia' (three) in its initial 'thi', creating a mnemonic connection. The rolling 'ro' suggests the dynamic nature of threefold division. This FV.CV pattern maintains the contemplative quality of thoughtful division.
